title: Outeniquasbosch Wildlife Village – Thank You Mossel Bay!
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Outeniquasbosch Wildlife Village is proud to have been named Joint Winner in the Project Developer Category in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards 2025.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Outeniquasbosch Wildlife Village is proud to have been named Joint Winner in the Project Developer Category in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers’ Choice Awards 2025."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This incredible recognition would not have been possible without the support of our residents, stakeholders, and the greater Mossel Bay community who voted for us.","html":"This incredible recognition would not have been possible without the support of our residents, stakeholders, and the greater Mossel Bay community who voted for us."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We extend our heartfelt thanks to every individual who has believed in our vision."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your trust and encouragement inspire us to continue developing a secure, sustainable, and lifestyle-driven community where nature and modern living meet in perfect harmony.","html":"Your trust and encouragement inspire us to continue developing a secure, sustainable, and lifestyle-driven community where nature and modern living meet in perfect harmony."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A unique lifestyle investment","html":"A unique lifestyle investment"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Nestled just outside Mossel Bay, Outeniquasbosch Wildlife Village offers a lifestyle unlike any other. Imagine waking up to the sights and sounds of nature, surrounded by free-roaming plains game, while still being only a few minutes from the ocean and the amenities of town.","html":"Nestled just outside Mossel Bay, Outeniquasbosch Wildlife Village offers a lifestyle unlike any other. Imagine waking up to the sights and sounds of nature, surrounded by free-roaming plains game, while still being only a few minutes from the ocean and the amenities of town."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"As we like to say: “It’s like living on your own private game farm, just minutes from the ocean.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This rare combination of coastal living and natural tranquillity has made Outeniquasbosch one of the most sought-after property investments along the Garden Route.","html":"This rare combination of coastal living and natural tranquillity has made Outeniquasbosch one of the most sought-after property investments along the Garden Route."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Why choose Outeniquasbosch Wildlife Village?","html":"Why choose Outeniquasbosch Wildlife Village?"},{"type":"list","items":["Secure estate living – The estate is designed with safety and peace of mind in mind, featuring controlled access and 24-hour security.","Nature at your doorstep – Over 75% of the estate is dedicated to greenbelt areas, with more than 10 species of game roaming freely.","Prime location – Just 4 km from Hartenbos, 15 minutes from Mossel Bay CBD, and close to schools, hospitals, and shopping centers.","Diverse property options – From family homes to luxury residences, there are opportunities for all types of buyers.","Sustainable development – The estate embraces conservation-focused design, ensuring a balance between human habitation and wildlife preservation."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Whether you’re looking for a holiday retreat, a permanent home, or a long-term investment, Outeniquasbosch delivers exceptional value with unmatched lifestyle benefits.","html":"Whether you’re looking for a holiday retreat, a permanent home, or a long-term investment, Outeniquasbosch delivers exceptional value with unmatched lifestyle benefits."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Build your dream home at Outeniquasbosch Wildlife Village.","html":"Build your dream home at Outeniquasbosch Wildlife Village."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Exciting development updates","html":"Exciting development updates"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Demand for property within Outeniquasbosch has been overwhelming.","html":"Demand for property within Outeniquasbosch has been overwhelming."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Phase 9 is nearly sold out, highlighting the strong confidence buyers have in the estate."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"To meet this demand, Phase 7 will be launching soon, offering new opportunities for those who wish to secure their place in this thriving community.","html":"To meet this demand, Phase 7 will be launching soon, offering new opportunities for those who wish to secure their place in this thriving community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"We encourage interested buyers to act quickly - availability is limited, and phases have been selling faster than anticipated.","html":"We encourage interested buyers to act quickly - availability is limited, and phases have been selling faster than anticipated."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Discover more","html":"Discover more"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Outeniquasbosch Wildlife Village represents the future of modern estate living in Mossel Bay - where convenience, security and natural beauty come together.","html":"Outeniquasbosch Wildlife Village represents the future of modern estate living in Mossel Bay - where convenience, security and natural beauty come together."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information and the latest updates on available phases, visit our website.","html":"For more information and the latest updates on available phases, visit our website."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
